subject: Supply Chain Finance Program Launch
body:
Procurement and Treasury Teams,

We're launching a supply chain finance (reverse factoring) program. Details:

Program Structure:
- Bank partner: JPMorgan Chase
- Program limit: $5M
- Discount rate: SOFR + 50bps (currently ~4.75%)
- Eligible vendors: Those with payment terms >30 days

How It Works:
1. We approve vendor invoices as normal
2. Vendors can request early payment from JPMorgan at a discount
3. We pay JPMorgan on the original due date
4. We extend our payment terms from Net 30 to Net 60

Benefits:
- Working capital improvement: ~$1.2M (30 additional DPO days)
- No impact on our balance sheet (off-balance sheet financing)
- Vendors get faster payment (improved supplier relationships)
- No cost to us (vendors absorb the discount)

Eligible Vendor Analysis:
- 28 vendors qualify (annual spend >$50K, terms >30 days)
- Total eligible spend: $8.4M annually
- Expected utilization: 60% ($5M)

Implementation Timeline:
- Platform setup: 2 weeks
- Vendor onboarding: 4 weeks
- Expected go-live: May 1, 2026

Vendor communication templates attached. Please review before we send outreach.
